name: Dark Sacrifice
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>身</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>代</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>が</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>わりの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent activates a card or effect that would destroy a card(s) on the field: Negate the effect, then send 1 Level 3 or lower DARK monster from your Deck to your GY.
eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect that would destroy a card(s) on the field: Negate the effect, then send 1 Level 3 or lower DARK monster from your Deck to your GY.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
